chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 565 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2338/2023(Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 05-11-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. The instant Constitutional Petition was present in the office on 17-03-2023. On 21.03.2023, when the matter came up before the Court the Counsel for the petitioners was put on notice to satisfy about the maintainability. Thereafter no sincere efforts were made to address the question of maintainability raised by the Court, even on the last date of hearing i.e. 20.09.2023, Counsel for the petitioners sought time for preparation. The deliberate absence of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie indicates that they have lost their interest to pursue this petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
